violations.text: Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods fried cauliflower in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Prepared food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged Salmon was observed thawing in an intact ROP package. ROP Fish must be removed from package before thawing. Salmon was observed at 41DF. Salmon was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Ceiling tiles in the dining room were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2025
